title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!
